title: Hope Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Multisig approval of fake router deployment followed by token transfer to attacker's wallet

prevention.rule: Block any tx that updates SwapHelper to use a new router address and then immediately calls a transfer function to an unknown address.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that updates SwapHelper to use a new router address and then immediately calls a transfer function to an unknown address.
summary: Hope Finance was rug pulled through a fake router deployment and subsequent token transfer to the attacker's wallet. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that updates the SwapHelper to use a new router address and then immediately calls a transfer function to an unknown address.
